---
title: "John Penfold | Focused Photograpic"
subtitle: "Experienced Hasselblad and Nikon Specialist with Great Customer Focus"
image: JP.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
---

📞 07917 116974 — 📷 [My e-bay](http://www.ebay.co.uk/sch/imagingeye/m.html?_nkw=&_armrs=1&_ipg=&_from=){target="_blank"} — 📧 [My email](mailto:focusedphotographic@hotmail.com)

<br/>

I'd love to hear from you ... whether you're buying, selling or just want some guidance

And you're always welcome to come and find me in Leeds. Or you can meet me at my usual spot at the main camera fairs, including Photographica, Wolverhampton and Frome

And who am I? Well, after starting in the camera business in 1990, I've run Focused Photographic since 2004. Why use the word 'focused'? Because I care about giving great customer service, and mainly feature Hasselblad and Nikon
